description: Core FABER workflow primitives - issue management, branching, PR lifecycle. Meant to be extended by other workflows.

frame.description: Fetch work item and setup branch

pre_steps.name: Reload Context
pre_steps.description: Automatically reload critical artifacts for session continuity

pre_steps.name: Set Environment
pre_steps.description: Set the environment for the workflow to test to use appropriate .env variables.

post_steps.name: Commit and Push Changes
post_steps.description: Ensure all frame changes are committed and pushed (which will also create a branch to push to).

post_steps.name: Add GitHub Issue Comment to Complete Frame Phase
post_steps.description: Summarize completion of frame phase and propose next steps.
post_steps.prompt: /fractary-work:issue-comment --work-id {work_id} --context "Add a comment updating status of the issue as frame phase completed and suggesting next steps to take including the exact command to run to perform that next step."

architect.description: Design and plan - extend this phase in child workflows

pre_steps.name: Reload Context
pre_steps.description: Reload critical artifacts at phase boundary for context freshness
pre_steps.prompt: /fractary-faber:session-load --work-id {work_id} --trigger phase_start --context "Architect phase: prioritize issue requirements, refined issue context, and any other artifacts generated by the frame phase needed to complete the architect phase whose key deliverable is a technical specification."

pre_steps.name: Set Environment
pre_steps.description: Set the environment for the workflow to test to use appropriate .env variables.

post_steps.name: Commit and Push Changes
post_steps.description: Ensure all architect changes are committed and pushed

post_steps.name: Add GitHub Issue Comment to Complete Architect Phase
post_steps.description: Summarize completion of architect phase and propose next steps.
post_steps.prompt: /fractary-work:issue-comment --work-id {work_id} --context "Add a comment updating status of the issue as architect phase completed and suggesting next steps to take including the exact command to run to perform that next step."

build.description: Implementation - extend this phase in child workflows

pre_steps.name: Reload Context
pre_steps.description: Reload critical artifacts at phase boundary for context freshness
pre_steps.prompt: /fractary-faber:session-load --work-id {work_id} --trigger phase_start --context "Build phase: prioritize technical specification (spec path from state.artifacts.spec_path), implementation plan, and acceptance criteria and any other artifacts generated by the architect phase needed to complete the build phase whose key deliverable is working code matching the spec."

pre_steps.name: Set Environment
pre_steps.description: Set the environment for the workflow to test to use appropriate .env variables.

post_steps.name: Create Pull Request
post_steps.description: Create PR for the implementation (skips if PR already exists). Links to issue for auto-close on merge.

post_steps.name: Add GitHub Issue Comment to Complete Build Phase
post_steps.description: Summarize completion of build phase and propose next steps.
post_steps.prompt: /fractary-work:issue-comment --work-id {work_id} --context "Add a comment updating status of the issue as build phase completed and suggesting next steps to take including the exact command to run to perform that next step."

pre_steps.name: Reload Context
pre_steps.description: Reload critical artifacts at phase boundary for context freshness
pre_steps.prompt: /fractary-faber:session-load --work-id {work_id} --trigger phase_start --context "Evaluate phase: prioritize PR details (number, branch), CI status, spec for review criteria, test requirements, and any other artifacts generated by the build phase needed to complete the evaluate phase whose key deliverable is a verified, passing implementation."

pre_steps.name: Set Environment
pre_steps.description: Set the environment for the workflow to test to use appropriate .env variables.

pre_steps.name: Review PR CI Checks
pre_steps.description: Wait for and review CI/CD pipeline results

pre_steps.name: Forward Feature Branch to Test
pre_steps.description: Merge the feature branch into the test branch for test deployment. The PR remains open targeting main.

post_steps.name: Add GitHub Issue Comment to Complete Evaluate Phase
post_steps.description: Summarize completion of evaluate phase and propose next steps.
post_steps.prompt: /fractary-work:issue-comment --work-id {work_id} --context "Add a comment updating status of the issue as evaluate phase completed and suggesting next steps to take including the exact command to run to perform that next step."

pre_steps.name: Reload Context
pre_steps.description: Reload critical artifacts at phase boundary for context freshness
pre_steps.prompt: /fractary-faber:session-load --work-id {work_id} --trigger phase_start --context "Release phase: prioritize PR details for merge, branch name, evaluation results, deployment checklist, and any other artifacts generated by the evaluate phase needed to complete the release phase whose key deliverable is a merged PR and closed issue."

pre_steps.name: Set Environment to Production
pre_steps.description: Set the environment for the workflow to production to use appropriate .env variables for release.

pre_steps.name: Create Pull Request for Release
pre_steps.description: Create PR for release to production environment.

pre_steps.name: Merge PR to Main Branch
pre_steps.description: Merge the pull request to the main branch.

post_steps.name: Add GitHub Issue Comment to Complete Release Phase
post_steps.description: Summarize completion of release phase and propose next steps.
post_steps.prompt: /fractary-work:issue-comment --work-id {work_id} --context "Add a comment updating status of the issue as release phase completed and suggesting next steps to take including the exact command to run to perform that next step. Please also confirm the status of the Codex Sync step and list the files that were updated."

autonomy.description: Pauses before release for approval - recommended for production

always_load.description: Current workflow state file - essential for continuation
Workflow execution protocol - defines how to execute steps
